info.title: @digipair/skill-pronote
info.description: This skill provides functions to interact with the Pronote educational platform, allowing access to student data, grades, homework, timetables, and more.

parameters.name: pronoteURL
parameters.description: URL of the Pronote instance

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Student username

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Student password

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: weekNumber
parameters.description: Week number to fetch homeworks for

200.description: List of homeworks for the specified period

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

200.description: List of news items from the school

post.summary: Get grades for a specific period

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The academic period to fetch grades for

200.description: Grades data for the specified period

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

200.description: List of available academic periods for grades

post.summary: Get attendance data for a period

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The period to fetch attendance data for

200.description: Attendance data for the specified period

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

200.description: List of available periods for attendance data

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Starting date for the week to fetch canteen menu

200.description: Weekly canteen menu starting from the specified date

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: weekNumber
parameters.description: Week number to fetch timetable for

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Specific date within the week

200.description: Weekly timetable data with courses for each day

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: course
parameters.description: The course to fetch resources for

200.description: List of resources attached to the specified course

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

200.description: List of chat conversations available to the student

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: chat
parameters.description: The chat conversation to get recipients for

200.description: List of recipients in the specified chat

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: chat
parameters.description: The chat conversation to get messages for

200.description: List of messages in the specified chat

post.summary: Get available recipients for new chat

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

200.description: List of recipients available to start a new chat with

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: chat
parameters.description: The chat conversation to send message to

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The content of the message to send

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: news
parameters.description: The news item to mark as acknowledged

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: homework
parameters.description: The homework to update completion status for

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Whether the homework is completed (true) or not (false)

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: Pronote connection instance (uses context.privates.PRONOTE if not provided)

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject of the mail

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content of the mail

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: List of recipients for the mail

Homework.description: Represents a homework assignment with its details, attachments, and completion status

content.description: The content or description of the homework in HTML

dueDate.description: The date when the homework is due

isDone.description: Indicates whether the homework has been completed

returnFormat.description: The format in which the homework should be returned

attachments.description: List of attachments related to the homework

evaluation.description: Indicates whether the homework is subject to evaluation

custom.description: Indicates whether the homework is custom or predefined

progress.description: Progress percentage of the homework completion

News.description: Represents a news item from the school with content and acknowledgment status

id.description: Unique identifier for the news item

title.description: The title of the news item

createdAt.description: The date when the news item was created

acknowledged.description: Indicates whether the news item has been acknowledged by the user

attachments.description: List of attachments related to the news item

content.description: The content or description of the news item in HTML

author.description: The author of the news item

category.description: The category of the news item

Period.description: Represents an academic period with start and end dates

PeriodGrades.description: Contains all grades and averages for a specific academic period

studentOverall.description: Student's overall average for the period

subjects.description: List of subjects with their grades

modules.description: List of modules with their grades

Subject.description: Represents a school subject with grades and averages

outOf.description: Total points possible in this subject

Grade.description: Represents an individual grade with details about the assessment

subjectId.description: ID of the subject this grade belongs to

givenAt.description: Date when the grade was given

bonus.description: Whether this is a bonus grade

GradeScore.description: Represents a score or grade value with additional metadata

value.description: The numerical value of the score

outOf.description: Maximum possible value for this score

status.description: Status of the score (e.g., absent, excused)

disabled.description: Whether the score is disabled or invalid

Attendance.description: Contains attendance data including delays, absences, punishments, and observations

Delay.description: Represents a recorded delay with justification status

givenAt.description: Date and time when the delay occurred

duration.description: Duration of the delay in minutes

Absence.description: Represents a recorded absence with time period and justification

from.description: Start date and time of the absence

to.description: End date and time of the absence

timeMissed.description: Amount of time missed in minutes

Punishment.description: Represents a disciplinary punishment with details and attachments

givenAt.description: Date when the punishment was given

duringLesson.description: Whether the punishment is during lesson time

nature.description: Nature or type of the punishment

duration.description: Duration of the punishment in minutes

Observation.description: Represents a behavioral observation or note

givenAt.description: Date when the observation was made

sectionName.description: Name of the section where observation was made

shouldParentsJustify.description: Whether parents need to justify this observation

CanteenMenu.description: Represents a daily canteen menu with meals

Meal.description: Represents a meal with different course categories

Food.description: Represents a food item with allergen information

allergens.description: List of allergens present in the food

CourseDay.description: Represents a day with scheduled courses

courses.description: List of courses scheduled for this day

Course.description: Represents a scheduled course with time, location, and details

room.description: Room where the course takes place

group.description: Group or class attending the course

url.description: URL related to the course (e.g., online meeting link)

resourceId.description: ID of resources attached to this course

CourseResource.description: Represents educational resources attached to a course

Chat.description: Represents a chat conversation or message thread

subject.description: Subject or title of the chat

date.description: Date when the chat was created

Recipient.description: Represents a person who can receive messages

class.description: Class or role of the recipient

Message.description: Represents a message within a chat conversation

date.description: Date when the message was sent

size.description: Size of the attachment in bytes
